ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for each account */,
  "initial_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the account */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the account was opened */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of operation (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation being performed */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the account after the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for transaction types */,
  "transaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager in charge of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the branch is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the branch is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the branch's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the employee works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being audited */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operation occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of changes made during the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief explanation of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, transaction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
